zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏强整理蓄势
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD整体维持震荡偏强结构，价格运行在68.14至68.5窄幅区间上沿附近，多头略占优势，但动能尚未完全释放。

均线系统显示价格稳站SMA20之上，短期均线拐头向上形成支撑。MACD维持正值扩张，动能柱略有增强，趋势偏多结构稳固中。

短期支撑关注67.2附近与SMA20位置，若回踩不破仍属强势整理。上方阻力68.5若有效突破，有望打开短线延伸空间震荡中。

操作上建议以回调低吸为主，控制仓位并设置止损于67下方。若放量突破68.5，可顺势跟随短线多头趋势观察市场变化谨慎交易波动中。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is trading in a tight consolidation phase around 68.47, hovering just below the recent intraday high of 68.5. The broader structure shows a mild bullish bias as price remains above the 20-period SMA at 67.256. This positioning suggests buyers are still defending short-term trend support, although upside momentum has not yet expanded into a clear breakout continuation. A sustained break above this zone could attract renewed momentum buyers.

MACD reading at 0.383 indicates positive momentum, but without a visible signal line crossover context, strength appears moderate rather than accelerating. The 24-hour change of 0.32% reflects low volatility conditions, implying equilibrium between buyers and sellers. With RSI unavailable, price behavior relative to moving averages and micro highs becomes the primary tool, showing compressed momentum rather than directional expansion phase.

Immediate support is located at the 20-SMA near 67.25, followed by secondary support around 67.00 and a deeper demand zone near 66.50. Resistance is defined by the recent high at 68.50, with a breakout above potentially opening 69.20 and the psychological 70.00 level. The current range is narrowing, increasing the likelihood of an expansion move in either direction soon developing.

For trading approaches, breakout traders may consider long positions on a sustained move above 68.60 with confirmation, targeting 69.20 and 70.00, while placing stops below 67.80 to manage downside risk. Range traders may prefer selling near 68.50 resistance and buying dips toward 67.25 support. Until volatility expands, disciplined risk management and reduced position sizing remain essential in this compressed market environment.
